title: anarrhinum duriminium
side_effects: Anarrhinum duriminium can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, dizziness, and headaches in some individuals. In rare cases, excessive consumption may lead to allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and swelling. Long-term misuse can also result in liver damage and interactions with other medications. Furthermore, improper preparation or dosage may exacerbate conditions like high blood pressure, anxiety, and insomnia.
